posts.title: 欢迎来到我的博客
posts.content: 这是第一篇示例文章。你可以在此撰写技术文章、项目笔记或发布公告。

posts.title: Embedded Notes: Starting with STM32
posts.content: A short note for the embedded journey. First steps: 1. Create a clean project structure 2. Set up peripherals one by one 3. Keep the first build minimal 4. Add logging early 5. Iterate carefully
